name: Miniclaw Realty
description: Real estate workflow orchestration for FSBO sellers and small brokerages — pricing, listings, showings, transactions, and market reports.

attom_api_key_vault.description: mc-vault key name for ATTOM Data API key (default: attom_api_key)

default_market.description: Default metro area for comp searches (e.g. 'Miami-Fort Lauderdale')

comp_radius_miles.description: Radius in miles for comparable property search

comp_lookback_months.description: How many months back to search for comps

comp_max_results.description: Maximum number of comps to return

auto_syndicate.description: Auto-post listings to syndicate_platforms on generate-listing
